gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, with students lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; moreover, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
